mission.title: atlantis: feat: support using repo configuration from a branch
mission.description:
## what

Instead of always using the atlantis.yaml file present in the pull request branch, allow users to specify a branch that contains an approved version of atlantis.yaml.

## why

This allows enabling things like approval requirement overrides for repo config, while ensuring a user can't simply change the configuration to drop an approval requirement in the branch they're currently working on.

An example would be creating a server-side configuration like this:

```yaml
---
repos:
  - id: github.com/gocardless/app
    apply_requirements: [approved, mergeable]
    allowed_overrides: [apply_requirements, workflow]
    allow_custom_workflows: false
    config_source_branch: master
workflows:
  lab:
    plan:
      steps:
        - init
        - plan:
            extra_args: [-var-file, lab.tfvars]
  prd:
    plan:
      steps:
        - init
        - plan:
            extra_args: [-var-file, prd.tfvars]
```

Specifying a rigid workflows that become all that is available to run in g

resolution.summary:
Rebase our changes on the upstream Atlantis. The following changes were cherry picked on top of the upstream:
- https://github.com/runatlantis/atlantis/commit/2414a7316f464b1f16c15a9eef676d3731814813 - Support using repo configuration from a branch
- https://github.com/runatlantis/atlantis/commit/062e9fa2a920883a51316ac03c1aa9ca6a3ef395 - Remove the default terraform version feature and add support for older versions
- https://github.com/runatlantis/atlantis/commit/75794dbda4e54b0da68556a8f9113b6661c6bd19 - Execute test workflow against pull request

We also have a PR open for getting the branch repo configuration changes into upstream [here](https://github.com/runatlantis/atlantis/pull/3678).
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
codeSnippets:
---
repos:
  - id: github.com/gocardless/app
    apply_requirements: [approved, mergeable]
    allowed_overrides: [apply_requirements, workflow]
    allow_custom_workflows: false
    config_source_branch: master
workflows:
  lab:
    plan:
      steps:
        - init
        - plan:
            extra_args: [-var-file, lab.tfvars]
  prd:
    plan:
      steps:
        - init
        - plan:
            extra_args: [-var-file, prd.tfvars]

---
version: 2
projects:
  - dir: terraform/google/projects/apps
    apply_requirements: []
    workspace: lab
    workflow: lab
  - dir: terraform/google/projects/apps
    apply_requirements: [approved]
    workspace: prd
    workflow: prd
